modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Listserv messages are not being sent to subscribers.

full_description_text: 
Listserv emails are not going out. 
I got errors saying the message is too big. 
Some addresses are bad or there is a mail loop. 
Subscribers are not receiving anything.
short_description: Listserv messages are not being sent to subscribers.
description:

Some addresses are bad or there is a mail loop. 
Subscribers are not receiving anything.
